description: Sauti annotation schema for harmful speech detection in East African social media

categories.label: Hate Speech
categories.description: Content that attacks or dehumanizes a person or group based on protected characteristics

severity_guide.2: Clear negative characterisation of a group
severity_guide.4: Explicit calls for discrimination or exclusion

categories.label: Offensive Language
categories.description: Insults, vulgar abuse, or degrading language not targeting a protected group

severity_guide.2: Clear insult directed at an individual

categories.label: Distress-Triggering Language
categories.description: Content designed or likely to cause fear, panic, anxiety, or emotional destabilisation

severity_guide.1: Unsettling but mild — could be unintentional
severity_guide.3: Direct threats or graphic distressing content

categories.label: Gaslighting
categories.description: Patterns that deny, minimise, or distort someone's perception of reality or their own experience
indicators: Denying events the target witnessed or experienced
Telling someone their memory is wrong without evidence
Reframing the target's emotional response as overreaction
Insisting a harmful act did not happen or was misunderstood
Repeatedly questioning the target's sanity or stability

severity_guide.2: Clear denial of target's stated experience
severity_guide.3: Pattern of reality-denial within one message
severity_guide.5: Coordinated campaign to make target doubt their sanity

categories.label: Manipulation
categories.description: Coercive, exploitative, or psychologically controlling communication tactics

severity_guide.5: Coercive control pattern, potential abuse indicator

categories.label: Ambiguous / Needs Human Review
categories.description: Content that may be harmful depending on context, relationship, or cultural reading — route to human reviewer

severity_guide.1: Probably fine, flagged out of caution
severity_guide.3: Likely harmful but cannot confirm without context

label_fields.category: One of the category IDs above
label_fields.target_group: If hate_speech: which group is targeted (free text)
label_fields.tactic: If manipulation: which tactic(s) from the tactics list
label_fields.rationale_spans: Array of {start, end, text} — exact substrings justifying the label
label_fields.language: Detected language: en | sw | sheng | mixed
label_fields.annotator_confidence: 1=low, 2=medium, 3=high — annotator's confidence in their own label
label_fields.notes: Free text — cultural context, edge case notes, uncertainty

notes: A single post can have multiple labels, e.g. hate_speech + gaslighting simultaneously. Each label gets its own severity score.
